expectations.evidence: Split into 3 files by layer: DB schema (01), API routes (02), UI (03). Each is a coherent concern.
Numbered 01/02/03. Schema must exist before API, API before UI. Order is correct.
All three files have context paragraphs explaining purpose and dependencies (e.g., 'These fields must be added... before the API routes or UI can be built').
Very detailed: MIME types listed, 5MB limit, validation rules (2-30 chars nickname), API response shapes, file upload directory path.
